description: Style Note This summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This top is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest.   Product DetailsGreen top has a round neck, is sleeveless with brown binding at the hem, has ruffle design in brown colour on the front and elasticated smocking at hem  Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
